validation.specializationRequiredDoctor: Specialization is required for doctor accounts

roomReady.title: Video call ready
roomReady.body: Your doctor is ready for the video visit. Open HealthHub to join.

callEnded.title: Video call ended
callEnded.body: Your video visit has ended. Records and any prescriptions are saved.

patientJoined.title: Patient is in the room
patientJoined.body: The patient has joined the video room and is waiting.

invite.acceptedBody: {{name}} accepted your invite to be added as your {{relationship}}.

lock.confirmLock: Lock {{name}}? Their records will be hidden from your family view.
lock.confirmUnlock: Unlock {{name}}? Their records will appear in your family view again.
lock.lockedRecordBody: Records hidden by family privacy lock.

invitePage.ogDescription: Open the link in HealthHub to accept the invite.
invitePage.inviteLine: {{inviter}} wants to add you as their {{relationship}}
invitePage.inviteLineNoRel: {{inviter}} wants to add you to their HealthHub

invalid.missingBody: The link you opened is incomplete.
invalid.notFoundBody: This invite doesn't exist or has been removed.
invalid.revokedBody: The sender cancelled this invite. Ask them for a new link.
invalid.expiredBody: This invite has expired. Ask the sender to generate a fresh link.

welcome.body:
Welcome to HealthHub 🇱🇰

Your secure health locker. Store records, family history, vaccinations — all in one place.

Pick a language to start:

nic.prompt:
Please send your National Identity Card (NIC) number.

Old format: 9 digits + V/X
New format: 12 digits
nic.invalid:
That doesn't look like a valid NIC. Please re-check and send again.

Old format: 9 digits + V/X
New format: 12 digits
nic.registered: This NIC is already registered. Open the HealthHub app and sign in with your NIC + date of birth.

dob.prompt:
Now send your date of birth.

Format: YYYY-MM-DD
Example: 1990-05-12
dob.invalid: Date of birth must be in YYYY-MM-DD format and in the past. Example: 1990-05-12

otp.prompt:
We sent a 6-digit code to your mobile. Please send it here.

(If you didn't receive it, type *resend*)
otp.invalid: That code is incorrect. {{remaining}} attempt(s) left.
otp.expired: That code has expired. Type *resend* to get a new one.
otp.locked: Too many wrong attempts. Type *resend* to start over.
otp.resent: A new code has been sent. Please share it here.

done.body:
✅ You're registered!

Open HealthHub and sign in with your NIC + date of birth. Your records are waiting.

already.body:
You're already registered on HealthHub.

Open the app and sign in with your NIC + date of birth.

whatsapp.fallback: Sorry, I didn't understand that. Type *start* to begin again.

imaging.recordIdRequired: recordId is required for large instance upload
imaging.presignFailed: Could not mint a presigned upload URL. Try again.
imaging.studyNotFound: No imaging study matches that UID
imaging.parseFailed: DICOM header could not be parsed; file stored without structured metadata
